1.0.0.en: Initial standalone Somfy Protect release with in-app login and direct Homey sync.

1.0.3.en: Changed icons for each device + Community guidelines

1.0.4.en: Added smoke detector support, upgraded driver icons to cleaner vector-style silhouettes, and special thanks to our first user for the feature request.

1.1.0.en: Added smoke detector support, upgraded driver icons to cleaner vector-style silhouettes, and special thanks to our first user for the feature request.
